name: Bone of the Ancients
description:
E-tech relic made by Eridian. It boosts damage for one element and also shortens Action Skill cooldown, making it strong for builds that lean on matching elements.

Variants roll Incendiary, Shock, or Corrosive. In Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode it is obtained from Legendary Loot Midgets only.
notes: At OP10 the Action Skill cooldown bonus can reach 51.0%, and the elemental damage bonus can reach 42.0%.

special.description:
Rolls with a single elemental damage bonus: Incendiary, Shock, or Corrosive.

Grants increased damage for the rolled element and faster Action Skill recharge. The elemental damage boost is multiplicative rather than additive like most gun damage bonuses.

abilities: Improves elemental damage and action skill
